name: form-rhf-textarea

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## form-rhf-textarea
**Type:** registry:example
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** react-hook-form, @hookform/resolvers, zod

visual_summary: The form-rhf-textarea component is a visually unobtrusive form field that displays a rich text editor, commonly used in blogging and content creation applications. It is typically employed when a developer needs to collect user-provided text content, such as articles or comments, from a user. It can be integrated into various applications, providing an efficient and user-friendly experience.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: form-rhf-textarea
Description: The form-rhf-textarea component is a visually unobtrusive form field that displays a rich text editor, commonly used in blogging and content creation applications. It is typically employed when a developer needs to collect user-provided text content, such as articles or comments, from a user. It can be integrated into various applications, providing an efficient and user-friendly experience.
Style: e.g. minimal, e.g. compact
Interactions: e.g. focusable, e.g. placeholder, e.g. resizable
Tags: form, textarea, rich text editor, content creation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
